Same procedure as EXP-271 rescue commit ac474a9. Also implement structural fix: decider push-failure handler should mark issues fix-in-flight (not fixed) when push 403s on NEVER_PUSH infrastructure files — this is the 5th phantom integration in 6 days.

TONIGHT: Monitor 8 April-EOM dome window closures (PRED-077/081/085/087/088/090/111/106 all due 2026-04-30T23:59Z). Watch for dome-side goalpost moves vs clean silent-ignore pattern.
